title: Which artbook
wikitext:
[]: Which artbook...?             Quote Post by Tetsu Aero » Sun May 18, 2008 7:49 pm Did this artwork come from? Der Monde?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun May 18, 2008 7:58 pm Dunno if it was in an artbook, but it was one of the gainax frontpage images.

[]:             Quote Post by Tetsu Aero » Mon May 19, 2008 7:44 am Okies, i'll look into it ^^ Don't you think it's funny that Hirako's plug suit showed the colors of EVA-05 already at that time it was released? xD

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Mon May 19, 2008 7:52 am I can tell for certain that it isn't included in "Der Mond" - at least not in my copy.

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Mon May 19, 2008 11:24 pm I don't think it's in any artbook, it was a splash page at the GAINAX website some years ago. If it's anywhere, it's probably in one of the Chronicle issues, not in Die Stern or Der Mond.
